serverInfo.name: sap.mcp/pipeline_engine_cloud_edition
serverInfo.title: pipeline_engine_cloud_edition
serverInfo.description: MCP server for the pipeline_engine_cloud_edition service.

tools.name: getVersion
tools.description: Get the version of the vFlow runtime.

tools.name: listGraphs
tools.description: List all graphs from the repository.

tools.name: getGraph
tools.description: Find a graph in the repository given its name.

tools.name: listExecutionGraphs
tools.description: Lists all graphs of the runtime.

tools.name: startExecutionGraph
tools.description: Start a specific graph given by a graph execution request.

tools.name: deleteAllExecutionGraphs
tools.description: Delete or stop all or selected graphs.

tools.name: getExecutionGraph
tools.description: Get the execution details of a specific graph.

tools.name: deleteExecutionGraph
tools.description: Delete or stop a specific graph.

tools.name: POST_v1_runtime_restartgroups_restartGroupID
tools.description: Pause or resume a restart group.

tools.name: DELETE_v1_runtime_restartgroups_restartGroupID
tools.description: Remove all graphs in a restart group.

tools.name: getGraphDescription
tools.description: Get the graph description of a handle.

tools.name: queryExecutionGraphs
tools.description: Query the list of graph execution objects.
